title: Human es-fMRI Resource: Concurrent deep-brain stimulation and whole-brain functional MRI
description: This dataset comprises concurrent deep-brain electrical stimulation and whole-brain functional MRI data from 26 patients with medically refractory epilepsy. Patients underwent intracranial electrode implantation for clinical purposes, with one or multiple electrode contacts stimulated during fMRI acquisition using block design protocols. The resource includes anatomical imaging (T1, T2), resting-state fMRI, electrical stimulation-fMRI (es-fMRI) scans, field maps, electrode coordinates, and stimulation parameters, along with preprocessed derivatives.
methods_description: Data were collected from 26 human patients with surgically implanted intracranial electrodes in cortical and subcortical locations for medically refractory epilepsy. Electrical stimulation was applied to one or multiple electrode contacts during concurrent BOLD-fMRI acquisition using block design protocols. Data organization includes pre-operative (pre-implantation) and post-operative (post-implantation) sessions with anatomical scans, resting-state fMRI, es-fMRI scans, and associated field maps. Preprocessing was performed using fMRIprep and Freesurfer.

funding_references.funder_name: The Simons Foundation Collaboration on the Global Brain (RA)
UK Wellcome Trust (CIP) and European Research Council (CIP)
